import.title: Import Markdown Folder
import.description: Import nested markdown files from a local directory into your notes.

importFiles.description: Select one or more local markdown files to import directly into your notes.

export.title: Export to Markdown
export.description: Export all your notes to a local directory as markdown files.

cleanupDirectories.description: Delete folders that do not contain notes anywhere in their subtree.

cleanupTags.title: Clear Unused Tags
cleanupTags.description: Delete tags that are not associated with any notes.
cleanupTags.previewDescription_one: The following tag will be deleted.
cleanupTags.previewDescription_other: The following {{count}} tags will be deleted.

about.title: About

excalidraw.placeholder: Click the top left corner to start drawing

prompts.system:
You are ZeroSort AI, a minimalist note organization assistant.
Analyze the user input and return a structured JSON object.
prompts.regenerateTitle: Regenerate a short, clear title (max 6 words) for this content.
prompts.regenerateSummary: Regenerate a 2-3 sentence summary/preview for this content.
prompts.regenerateCatalog: Regenerate the folder hierarchy (catalog) for this content and return it as a string array. With no more than 3 levels. For example: ["Work", "Meetings", "Summary"] or ["Personal", "Recipes", "Salads"]
prompts.regenerateTags: Suggest relevant tags for this content. Return a flat array of short, descriptive tag names (1-3 words each). Suggest 2-5 tags that capture the key topics.
prompts.existingDirectories:
The user has the following directory structure: {{directories}} 

 Please categorize the current note. Please follow this logic:
 1. If the note content matches an existing directory topic well, categorize it directly into that existing directory.
 2. If the note belongs to a specific sub-field of an existing directory, you may create a new subdirectory under that directory.
 3. If the note's topic is unrelated to any existing directory, do not force it into an existing one. You must create a brand-new, independent root directory for it.

schema.title: A short, clear name for the note (max 6 words).
schema.catalog: A concise folder hierarchy (catalog) as an array of strings for this content. With no more than 3 levels. For example: ["Work", "Meetings", "Summary"] or ["Personal", "Recipes", "Salads"]
schema.summary: A 2-3 sentence preview for the note card.
schema.tags: An array of short, descriptive tag names (1-3 words each, 2-5 tags) that capture the key topics of the note.

ai.includeExistingDirsTooltip: Refer to the existing directories structure
ai.noModelSelected: Please select an AI model in settings.
ai.requestFailed: AI request failed. Please try again after checking model settings.

errors.failed: AI request failed. Please try again.

prompts.contextPrefix:
Here is the full document for context:

{{fullDocument}}

---

Now, focusing on the following selected portion:
prompts.improve:
{{contextPrefix}}Improve the following text while maintaining its meaning. Only return the improved text, no explanations:

{{text}}
prompts.proofread:
{{contextPrefix}}Proofread and fix any grammar, spelling, or punctuation errors in the following text. Only return the corrected text:

{{text}}
prompts.translate:
{{contextPrefix}}Translate the following text to {{option}}. Only return the translation:

{{text}}
prompts.longer:
{{contextPrefix}}Expand the following text with more detail while keeping the same meaning. Only return the expanded text:

{{text}}
prompts.shorter:
{{contextPrefix}}Make the following text more concise while keeping its meaning. Only return the shortened text:

{{text}}
prompts.tone:
{{contextPrefix}}Rewrite the following text in a {{option}} tone. Only return the rewritten text:

{{text}}
prompts.simplify:
{{contextPrefix}}Simplify the following text to make it easier to understand. Only return the simplified text:

{{text}}
prompts.explain:
{{contextPrefix}}Explain the following text in simple terms. Provide a clear and concise explanation:

{{text}}
prompts.mindmap:
Convert the following text into a hierarchical mindmap structure using markdown. Use headings (##, ###) for main topics and nested bullet points (-) for subtopics. Keep it concise and well-organized. Only return the markdown, no explanations:

{{text}}
prompts.mermaid:
Convert the following text into a Mermaid diagram. Choose the most appropriate diagram type (flowchart, sequence, class, state, ER, gantt, or pie). Return ONLY valid Mermaid syntax — no markdown code fences, no explanations, just the raw Mermaid code. Start with the diagram type keyword (e.g., graph TD, sequenceDiagram, classDiagram, etc.):

{{text}}

chart.base: Analyze the following text and extract numerical data to create a Chart.js {{chartType}} chart configuration. Return ONLY a valid JSON object (no markdown fences, no explanations, just raw JSON). The JSON MUST include a "type" field set to "{{chartType}}". Use descriptive labels derived from the text. If there are multiple data series, create multiple datasets with different colors. {{colorsHint}}

sync.title: Cloud Sync
sync.description: Sync your notes to S3-compatible storage for backup and multi-device access.
sync.refreshPartialTags: Sync completed, but tags could not be refreshed.
sync.refreshFailed: Sync completed, but local data could not be refreshed. Reload the app to see the latest changes.

recovery.title: Remote recovery recommended
recovery.description: ZeroSort detected that your local sync state is unexpectedly empty. Recover from remote to rebuild local data without deleting cloud data.

deletion.title: High Deletion Rate Detected
deletion.description: {{count}} out of {{total}} items ({{percentage}}%) would be deleted, exceeding the {{threshold}}% safety threshold. This may indicate a configuration issue or accidental data loss.

unsafe.title: Sync Blocked by Unsafe Local State
unsafe.description: {{count}} managed item is still referenced locally, but ZeroSort could not verify its local file. Sync is blocked to prevent accidental data loss.

concurrency.title: Sync Concurrency
concurrency.description: Number of parallel operations during sync. Higher values sync faster but use more bandwidth.

encryption.title: Encryption Password
encryption.description: Password used to encrypt your notes before uploading to the cloud. Keep this password safe - you'll need it to decrypt your data.
encryption.notConfigured: Not configured - sync will not work
encryption.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
encryption.changeWarning: Changing your password will require a full re-sync of all notes

buckets.title: Select Bucket
buckets.createBucket: Create a bucket in your S3 console first

licenseGate.description: Cloud synchronization requires an active ZeroSort license. Please activate your license to unlock this feature.
licenseGate.featureLocked: Cloud sync requires an active license
